form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 0.8 lengths second (30.16) over 520m at Geelong. In form and can return to the winners' list.

form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at his last couple but he does have good record over this track and distance. Safely held last time but can do far better here.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (30.22) in a Special conditions H, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 6. Leading player.
